post_text: I almost ignored a message… and that would have been a mistake.A few days ago, I received a message on LinkedIn.It wasn’t from a client.It wasn’t from someone famous.It wasn’t even about business.It was a young professional who simply wrote:“Your posts make me feel like someone understands what we go through at work.”That’s it.Normally, on busy days, messages like these can get lost between meetings, deadlines, and a hundred notifications.But that one line made me pause.Because when we create content, lead teams, or build businesses, we often start thinking in numbers.Followers.Views.Engagement.But that message reminded me of something important.Behind every number… there is a real person.Someone reading quietly.Someone relating silently.Someone feeling seen.Sometimes the biggest impact isn’t when a post goes viral.Sometimes the real impact is when one person feels understood.That small moment reminded me why I started sharing in the first place - not just to grow an audience, but to create connection.Have you ever received a small message or comment that unexpectedly meant a lot to you? I’d love to hear your story in the comments.#audiencegrowth #newconnections #success #dishashukla #insidea… more
reasoning: The author does not appear to be a senior professional in the Data Science or AI field, and the post is more focused on content creation and audience growth rather than technical topics.

post_text: The future of cloud security is being decided at runtime. Our runtime-first approach was validated last week when Sysdig was a recognized as a Leader in The Forrester Wave for CNAPP, Q1 2026. But for Sysdig Founder & CTO Loris Degioanni, this moment is bigger than a report — it’s proof that the market is reaching an inflection point, where point solutions are collapsing and runtime security is is non-negotiable.
reasoning: This post is a good networking opportunity because Loris Degioanni is a CTO and the topic of cloud security and runtime security is relevant to data science and AI engineering, allowing for meaningful engagement and discussion.
